title: Darkest Days
description: Atmospheric magic+rpg pack with long nights and magic!
body:
# Darkest Days
## Key Aspects
- Longer, harder nights!
  - You start at night & nights last 40 minutes, day is reduced to 2 minutes
  - The first few days are peaceful to give you a head start
- New mobs which get stronger over time!
- **Aestethics** form that beautiful night gameplay
- Enhanced **weaponry** and magic!
- Auto-Magic with **Affinity**
- Built for straight-forward **Multiplayer** with Voice Chat
- Beautiful world generation by Oh The Biomes We've Gone, Incendium and Nullscape!

## Notes
This modpack was put together to play around with Wisp Forest's Affinity. It is meant to be played in Multiplayer as a Vanilla+ game.
You will find some astonishing visual mods here: Particular and Ambiance! do a great job at bringing life to the world. Spyglass Astronomy and TimeCycle help setting the stage for short and intimidating daylight, while Sound Physics and Presence Footsteps help deliver the final experience.
And of course WorldHost and Simple Voice Chat enable this pack to be played with friends without hustle.
Thank you all!
